title: 第 92 節
en: — attempt at reconstructing it, wrong in principle, 311. Urvasi, 57.
— true meaning of, 1 17- — the Dawn as an agent, 1 20.
— daughter of Dyaiis, the Sky, 138, — a lovely maiden, 148.
— sing, or plur., mother(s) of Surya, f 2 INDEX.
Uutar, mist or fog, Finnish goddess, VADHRIMATl, given a son by the Asvins, 595.
Vagitanus, the god who helps children to cry, 151.
Vaisvanara, first an epithet of Agni, Vafr, Speech, an abstract deity, 151, Vakpati on the worship of Parvati, Vanaspati, Vedic name of deity, 57.
Vanna-issa, Ukko's name among the Ests, 262.
— the Old Father, and Koi and Ammarik, 267. Varana by the side of Varuwa, 417, Varma-Paz, Mordvinian god of the air and winds, 240. Vartika (Ortygia), the quail swallowed by the wolf, 93, 514, 584.
— delivered by the Asvins, 584. Varuwa, god of the sky, changed into the god of the waters, 50, 818.
— the agent of the evening sky, 120, J2i, 545-55?- — wider meaning of, 120, 132.
— not restricted to the moon, 134, — Agni identified with, 147.
— and Ouranos, 216, 387, 390,416- — Wackernagel's etymology of, 390, — and Varawa, 417.
